flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Robert Morris University rose 26% between 2006 and 2009 ($16.3k → $20.6k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 25% at Robert Morris University vs the 2003–2007 baseline (2.9k vs 3.8k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Robert Morris University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (1.2% → 0.0%).
